## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

## Testing

<!-- Include commands run and, for BLE work, the physical phone + strap model tested. -->

- [ ] `./gradlew testFullDebugUnitTest`
- [ ] `./gradlew assembleFullDebug`
- [ ] `./gradlew assembleFullRelease` if release behavior changed

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit secrets, keystores, `local.properties`, or generated APKs.
- [ ] I updated Android docs or README content if user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] I verified merged permissions if privacy/network behavior changed.
- [ ] BLE/protocol changes were tested on real hardware or clearly marked as unverified.
